title: Evaluation of the impact of glycolysis-related gene signatures on prognosis and therapeutic targeting in lung adenocarcinoma.
snippet: Abnormal glycolysis is one of the hallmarks of cancer and plays a significant role in its progression. This study investigates the association between glycolysis genes and the progression of lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD). Utilizing various bioinformatics techniques, the research explores the heterogeneity of glycolysis genes in different LUAD cell types, ident...
